case_title: SUSAN MARA BUGALA VS. THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP INC A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUGALA, SUSAN MARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA KAISER PERMANENTE $5,685.82 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,865.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUGALA, SUSAN MARA
